summary: Tested Morning Brief feature (backend + frontend) — all critical paths pass. Backend: 4/4 pytest tests pass covering auth 401, cache-miss on first call, cache-hit on second, force=true regenerates. Frontend: Playwright E2E confirmed card renders with populated Arabic AI summary, exactly 3 focus items with data-testids, refresh button animates spinner and shows sonner success toast, focus click navigates to correct engine route (/content in test run), and no console/JS errors. Workspace regression: KPIs, engine cards, quick-add-fab all intact.
critical_code_review_comments: workspace_engine.py — _parse_ai_json fallback path (lines 258-264) returns raw parsed dict without validating it has both 'summary' and 'focus' keys; strict block on line 253 does check but the last-chance block does not. Minor: could return partial/bad dict on malformed AI output. Low priority since deterministic fallback catches empty summary.

Workspace.jsx line 68-70 — loadBrief(false) is called on every re-render of the effect whose deps are [data, user]; both are stable after first fetch so this is fine, but consider a mounted ref to prevent double-fires in StrictMode dev.
Backend endpoint returns 200 even if AI fails (deterministic fallback engaged silently); consider adding a 'ai_used: bool' field for observability, but not blocking.
test_credentials: crm@test.com / testpass123 (super_admin) worked as documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: None; used existing super_admin data (1 client, 1 task, 0 deals/content).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Morning Brief endpoint POST /api/workspace/morning-brief is fully working. Cache key is {user_id, date} in db.workspace_briefs. AI (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergent) responds in Arabic JSON reliably (~5-10s first call). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_morning_brief.py can be reused. Frontend testids confirmed: morning-brief-card, morning-brief-summary, morning-brief-refresh, morning-focus-0/1/2, quick-add-fab, nav-workspace. Login flow: input[type=email] + input[type=password] + button[type=submit] redirects to /feed; then click nav-workspace bottom nav to reach /workspace.
